subcodes.first_line: O candle of the love of God! The luminous morn of guidance hath dawned and shineth resplendent from the horizon of the Supreme Concourse. Strange indeed it is that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای شمع محبه الله صبح نورانی هدی از افق ملا اعلی ساطع و لامع عجب در اینست که
subcodes.subjects: @light and darkness, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @being a source of light; guidance, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
